metadata.description: The Loop & Gate stack: a self-improving agent Foundation with plain-text memory, plus Build, Grow, and Accountability kits. One marketplace, four plugins.

plugins.name: loop-and-gate-foundation
plugins.description: Files-only agent memory in an Obsidian vault. Capture, reflect, and improve skills, plus a SessionStart hook that injects working memory each session. No vector database, no cloud.

plugins.name: loop-and-gate-build-kit
plugins.description: A judgment layer for building software with an agentic loop. Eleven human-decision gates plus the loop-and-gate operating skill.

plugins.name: loop-and-gate-grow-kit
plugins.description: A judgment layer for taking software to market with an agentic loop. Cadence-grouped grow gates plus the grow-and-gate operating skill.

plugins.name: loop-and-gate-accountability-kit
plugins.description: A judgment layer for your own follow-through. Eight gates and five ritual commands, with a deferral engine that flags the task you keep avoiding.
